Eduarda, the deal closed a month ago. How has the borrower been doing on compliance?
We have been monitoring the covenants since the closing, and they have been hitting every milestone.
Good. Have you flagged anything at all?
Just one item. Their reporting package arrived late, so I have been following up with their finance team.
Have you escalated it, or is it still at your level?
I have already escalated it to the credit committee, and we have agreed on a remediation plan.
Excellent work. So overall, how is their track record looking?
Very solid. They have been complying consistently for a month, so I am comfortable with the position.
The borrower has been complying with every milestone.
I have been following up with their finance team for two days.
Their track record has been solid since the closing.

Hi, this is a status update from the monitoring team. We have been tracking the covenants for three weeks now, and so far the borrower has been complying with every milestone. We have not flagged any major issue yet. One small point: the reporting package arrived two days late, so we have been following up with their finance team. If this slips again, we will escalate it. Overall, their track record has been solid since the closing.

Hi Eduarda, quick voicemail about the quarterly compliance review. I have been going through the borrower's reports all morning. The good news is that they have been hitting their milestones consistently. We have been monitoring the debt levels since the closing, and everything looks healthy. I have flagged just one item for remediation, and I have already escalated it to the credit committee. Let us discuss before the review meeting on Thursday.

The monitoring team has been tracking the covenants since the closing. They have been collecting the borrower's quarterly reports. An analyst has flagged one item that needs attention. The team has escalated the issue to the credit committee. A remediation plan has been agreed and put in place.
